body_transformation: The tail tip dissolves into wispy, translucent vapor with crimson mist swirling within its core, while the body adopts a deep violet hue with ebony black accents on the head and tail base. The white underbelly transforms into a pale silver sheen with faint energy ripples distorting its surface, and the rounded head gains hollow eye sockets filled with swirling mist. The stubby legs retain their structure but become semi-transparent with visible internal energy currents, and the smiling face expression subtly shifts to a ghostly, faintly glowing outline.
signature_feature: Tail tip: translucent violet vapor with crimson mist eddies and faint energy ripples.
